Send an enquiry

Share your product list, quantities and destination — or simply tell us what you need. Submitting opens your email client with the message pre-filled.

MINA FZC LLC is a UAE-based manufacturer, supplier, wholesaler and exporter of dental, surgical and medical instruments made from medical-grade stainless steel.

Precision in Every Instrument, Perfection in Every Procedure.
